forward.note: Steep ramp off the spin; entirely price/mix-driven as bits shrink.

trail.val: 5 multiyear NBMs; $42B minimum contractual revenue, >$11B financial guarantees; >1/3 of FY27 bit supply locked
Undersupply call extended end-CY26 -> end-CY27; LTAs floor-and-ceiling pricing + pre-pay walkaways w/ guarantees

forward.note: LTA layer is the durability/re-rating mechanism; ~25% effective floor on a downturn.

trail.val: Data center growing fast; DC $440M +64% q/q
CY26 data-center growth raised to mid-70s% (from 60s%)

forward.note: DC growth guide raised alongside QLC 'Stargate' ramp.

trail.val: BiCS 8 15% of bits; majority of bits exit FY26
BiCS 8 'gold standard'; led TLC eSSD; to majority of bit production exiting FY26

forward.note: Node transition is the eSSD share-gain lever vs Micron/Hynix-Solidigm.

trail.val: HBF first samples 2H26; first AI-inference devices early 2027; 8-16x HBM capacity at ~1.2TB/s; SK Hynix MOU

forward.note: Bull-case optionality; not HBM-drop-in, needs GPU redesign + ecosystem standardization.

trail.val: HPF (vs Kioxia Super IO) not due until 2028; 'dead on arrival' if Super IO succeeds (R&D w/ Global Unichip)

forward.note: Late vs Kioxia Super IO already shipping; competitive worry on the agentic-AI IO angle.

trail.val: NAND 8/10 vs DRAM 10/10; SanDisk price-setter but pricier on 2028 numbers; some 2028 LTA lock-in prices DOWN vs 2027 (esp. enterprise TLC), with escalators

forward.note: MS prefers Micron — SanDisk looks expensive on 2028 after the run; 2028 floor prices soft.
